commands:
$scriptContent = @'
Write-Host "Mounting EFS shares via SMB gateway..." -ForegroundColor Cyan

$gateway = "192.168.53.179"
$maxRetries = 5
$retryDelay = 10

# Define shares to mount
$shares = @(
    @{Letter="V:"; Share="zlvault"},
    @{Letter="L:"; Share="zlserverlogs"}
)

foreach ($share in $shares) {
    $mounted = $false
    $attempt = 0
    
    while (-not $mounted -and $attempt -lt $maxRetries) {
        $attempt++
        Write-Host "Mounting $($share.Letter) -> \\$gateway\$($share.Share) (attempt $attempt/$maxRetries)"
        
        # Delete existing mount if any
        net use $share.Letter /delete /y 2>$null
        
        # Try to mount
        $result = net use $share.Letter "\\$gateway\$($share.Share)" /persistent:yes 2>&1
        
        if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) {
            Write-Host "  SUCCESS: $($share.Letter) mounted" -ForegroundColor Green
            $mounted = $true
        } else {
            Write-Host "  FAILED: $result" -ForegroundColor Yellow
            if ($attempt -lt $maxRetries) {
                Write-Host "  Retrying in $retryDelay seconds..."
                Start-Sleep -Seconds $retryDelay
            }
        }
    }
    
    if (-not $mounted) {
        Write-Host "  ERROR: Failed to mount $($share.Letter) after $maxRetries attempts" -ForegroundColor Red
    }
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Current mounts:" -ForegroundColor Cyan
net use
'@

# Save script to startup location
$scriptPath = "C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\MountEFSShares.ps1"
$scriptContent | Out-File -FilePath $scriptPath -Encoding UTF8 -Force
Write-Host "Startup script created at: $scriptPath"

# Also create a scheduled task to run at startup with SYSTEM privileges
$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'PowerShell.exe' -Argument '-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -WindowStyle Hidden -File "C:\Scripts\MountEFSShares.ps1"'
$trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtStartup
$principal = New-ScheduledTaskPrincipal -UserId 'SYSTEM' -LogonType ServiceAccount -RunLevel Highest
$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -AllowStartIfOnBatteries -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries -StartWhenAvailable

# Create scripts directory
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\Scripts' -Force | Out-Null
$scriptContent | Out-File -FilePath 'C:\Scripts\MountEFSShares.ps1' -Encoding UTF8 -Force

# Register the task
Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'MountEFSShares' -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'MountEFSShares' -Action $action -Trigger $trigger -Principal $principal -Settings $settings -Description 'Mount EFS shares via SMB gateway at startup'

Write-Host "Scheduled task 'MountEFSShares' created to run at startup with SYSTEM privileges"
